member.name: M:YLproxy.Api.ApiEndpoints.SafeExecute(System.Func{Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IResult},System.String,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Wraps a synchronous endpoint handler with try-catch logging.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Api.ApiEndpoints.SafeExecuteAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IResult}},System.String,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Wraps an async endpoint handler with try-catch logging.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Api.ApiEndpoints.LogWithAudit(YLproxy.Infrastructure.ILogger,System.String,System.String,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Logs a message with optional source IP and User-Agent for audit trail.
